name: arc-browser-mcp
description: Local MCP server for inspecting and controlling Arc Browser Spaces and tabs on macOS.
long_description: Inspect Arc Spaces, tabs, folders, and history from local state, then perform explicit Arc actions such as creating, selecting, reloading, and closing tabs.

tools.name: arc_get_overview
tools.description: Get compact Arc inventory, counts, source health, and Space metadata.

tools.name: arc_query_tabs
tools.description: List, filter, and search Arc tabs using the fast local Arc index.

tools.name: arc_get_tab
tools.description: Get a full normalized Arc tab record by explicit tab ID.

tools.name: arc_get_sidebar_tree
tools.description: Get Arc Space, pinned, unpinned, and folder hierarchy.

tools.name: arc_search_history
tools.description: Search Arc Chromium history snapshots across local profiles.

tools.name: arc_analyze_tabs
tools.description: Analyze Arc tabs for duplicates, stale tabs, junk candidates, and missing URLs.

tools.name: arc_create_tab
tools.description: Create a new Arc tab in an explicit Space and return its verified tab ID.

tools.name: arc_focus_space
tools.description: Focus an Arc Space by explicit Space ID.

tools.name: arc_select_tab
tools.description: Select an Arc tab by explicit tab ID.

tools.name: arc_open_url
tools.description: Navigate a specific Arc tab, or the active tab when explicitly omitted.

tools.name: arc_reload_tabs
tools.description: Reload one or more Arc tabs by explicit tab IDs.

tools.name: arc_close_tabs
tools.description: Close one or more Arc tabs by explicit tab IDs.

tools.name: arc_execute_javascript
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in an explicit Arc tab when enabled by environment variable.
